chunks.text:
HEALTH INSURANCE POLICY
Policy Number: HLTH/2025/123456
COVERAGE
This policy provides coverage for hospitalization expenses up to the Sum Insured of n5,00,000 per
policy year. Coverage includes room rent, ICU charges, surgery costs, medicines, and diagnostic
tests.
Pre-hospitalization expenses are covered for 60 days before admission and post-hospitalization
expenses for 90 days after discharge.
SUB-LIMITS
Room Rent: Maximum n5,000 per day for general ward. ICU charges capped at n10,000 per
day.
Ambulance: Maximum n2,000 per hospitalization.
Cataract Surgery: Maximum n40,000 per eye per policy year.
EXCLUSIONS
The following are NOT covered under this policy:
Dental treatment unless requiring hospitalization exceeding 24 hours.

Cosmetic or plastic surgery except for medically necessary reconstructive surgery.
Treatment for obesity, weight control, or bariatric surgery.
Expenses incurred at non-network hospitals without prior cashless authorization
(reimbursement may be limited to 80% of eligible amount).
Items of personal comfort including but not limited to: telephone charges, attendant charges,
television, barber services, cosmetics, diapers.

4. WAITING PERIODS
Initial Waiting Period: 30 days from policy inception for all claims except accident-related
hospitalization.
Pre-existing Diseases: 48 months waiting period for conditions existing prior to policy
purchase.
Specific Diseases: 24 months for cataract, hernia, hysterectomy, joint replacement surgery,
benign prostatic hypertrophy, and gallbladder stones.
CO-PAYMENT
For policyholders aged 60 years and above, a co-payment of 20% applies to all claims. This means
the insured bears 20% of admissible claim amount, and the company pays 80%.
CLAIM PROCEDURE
Cashless Claims: Contact our 24x7 helpline at 1800-XXX-XXXX at least 24 hours before
planned hospitalization. For emergency admissions, notify within 24 hours of admission.

Reimbursement Claims: Submit claim form with original bills, discharge summary, diagnostic
reports, and payment receipts within 15 days of discharge.
All claims are subject to medical review and verification of supporting documents.
